originalTitle: Is XLE the Right Fit for Your Portfolio Before Summer?
summary: Energy stocks have cooled off substantially in Q2 and are getting whipsawed around by the Iran war.
content: Energy stocks have cooled off substantially in Q2 and are getting whipsawed around by the Iran war.
